sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after RIGHT
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("Current nodes:")
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
    max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
    min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
    max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
    print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min_r}-{max_r}, cols={min_c}-{max_c}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
